column1: # Rust manifest keys with no golden_map.tsv entry that match a rule below are
# reported as [Excluded] instead of [Unmapped] — they are un-mappable by
# design, so Unmapped counts only actionable mapping work.
# An explicit golden_map.tsv entry always wins over these rules.
#   kind = ext    — matches the key's file extension (edge.04.jpg → jpg)
#   kind = prefix — matches the key's parsed prefix   (edge.04.jpg → edge)
